title: Dale DevHost topology file (RFC 0006 R5)
description: The dev profile of a logic configuration: logic-block instances and explicit interface wiring, with contract mappings optional (unlisted contracts get DevHost mocks). The generic structural schema shipped with Vion.Dale.DevHost; 'dale dev --export-topology' writes a C#-built preset in this shape. Parsing is strict (unknown fields are rejected), so this schema catches wrong field names in hand edits.

id.description: URL-safe slug; must match the file name (<id>.topology.json). Scenario files reference it via "topology".

logicBlockInstances.description: The blocks in this topology; types are resolved against the loaded plugin assemblies.

typeFullName.description: Full type name of the LogicBlock (resolved from the loaded assemblies).

name.description: Instance name, unique within the topology. No '.', which scenario name paths split on.

instantiationParameters.description: RFC 0016: operator-chosen [InstantiationParameter] values (identifier -> JSON scalar; enums as member-name strings), applied to the block before Configure so config-time inclusion gates resolve. Optional.

interfaceMappings.description: Explicit logic-block interface wiring, applied verbatim (not re-discovered). Source and target names must be declared instances.

contractMappings.description: Optional explicit hardware-contract endpoint mappings; unlisted contracts are auto-mocked. Field names match `dale dev --export-config` (the 'mapped' prefix), so the two shapes no longer diverge.
